title: zamam #2161
definition:
1) to have a thought, devise, plan, consider, purpose
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to consider, fix thought upon
        1a2) to purpose, devise
        1a3) to plot (of evil intent)
nasbUsage:

    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to consider, fix thought upon

        1a3) to plot (of evil intent)

    NASB:  to consider, purpose, devise
